expectations.text: The response keeps `context canceled`, `shutdown`, `drain`, `worker`, `race`, and `integration` as exact signals.
The response points to lifecycle or readiness surfaces such as `cmd/service/internal/bootstrap/` and `internal/app/health/service.go`.
The response does not treat increasing timeouts as the primary solution.
expectations.evidence: Did not make timeout inflation the primary solution.

expectations.text: The response includes race-aware or integration-aware verification steps and keeps remaining ambiguity explicit.

eval_feedback.overall: Custom deterministic checks for this benchmark run.
